misc.title: #ONEPIECE1178 "Chapter ends in Mary Geoise, we see that outside the Pangaea Castle some buildings are burned and destroyed." Saying it again, the attacker are the Blackbeard pirates. He follow the ste
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1178 "Chapter ends in Mary Geoise, we see that outside the Pangaea Castle some buildings are burned and destroyed." Saying it again, the attacker are the Blackbeard pirates. He follow the steps of his father... WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1155 This chapter confirmed the following for me: The fraction that currently attacking the World Government (which Imu spoke of) are the Blackbeard Pirates, and several factors point to this that make more sense than the Revos. I will now name all of these factors. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/1946982514737737853#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1178 "Imu: "If only thou would disappear from this world...!! JUST AS ROCKS DID!!! In exchange for even greater power... Mu shall take a portion of thy lifespan. In return, you two...!! Look
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1178 "Imu: "If only thou would disappear from this world...!! JUST AS ROCKS DID!!! In exchange for even greater power... Mu shall take a portion of thy lifespan. In return, you two...!! Look upon each other with hatred!!" Yo Rocks name still haunts Imu... 👀
